joint_topic: Genome-Inspired Modular Routing for Mixture-of-Experts Body Plans
mechanism: The router regulates which expert modules activate per token, and we treat these activation patterns as developmental switches: distinct module-activation combinations induce distinct specialized subnetworks, so one shared parameter set produces many task-specific architectures depending on which modules switch on.
primary_quote: a single genome induces many distinct body plans depending on which modules switch on

joint_topic: Test-Time Weight Updates as Cellular Competency for Coherent Inference
mechanism: Test-time training updates a small inner model on each input sequence, which transforms local prediction errors into corrective weight adjustments; treating each updated sub-model as a competent agent routes these local corrections into a coherent global representation, analogous to how cells transform local errors into coherent anatomy.
primary_quote: transforming local errors into coherent global anatomy

joint_topic: Continual Capability Gains Compounding Into Broad AI Impact
mechanism: Repeated optimization across successive model generations induces incremental loss reductions that activate latent capabilities, and the accumulation of these activated capabilities transforms narrow gains into broad cross-domain impact.
primary_quote: the models just kind of get better over time
